texts.csPortfolioRole: IT Support Automation and Tools Builder
texts.csPortfolioTagline: I build practical Windows support tools, PowerShell workflows, GitHub Pages utilities and documentation that make repeated troubleshooting tasks easier to run and maintain.
texts.csPortfolioAvailability: Focused on practical IT support systems
texts.csPortfolioExperience: Windows Support • PowerShell • GitHub Pages • CMS-controlled sites
texts.csPortfolioBio: CyberSabil is focused on reliable, easy-to-update support systems: command launchers, cleanup workflows, monitoring utilities, documentation hubs and small dashboards for real Windows support needs.
